• Identify every infected file, script, and database entry 
• Remove or replace compromised code without breaking store functionality, orders, or product data 
• Patch vulnerabilities, update components, and set the correct permissions so the hack can’t return 
• Deliver a brief post-clean report summarising what you found, how you fixed it, and steps I should follow to stay secure (firewall, backups, security plugin, etc.)

The job is complete when the site loads with no pop-up or redirect behaviour, passes an external malware scan (Sucuri / Google Safe Browsing), and runs smoothly for normal customers.

projects.title: Senior Data Scientist Needed

I’m gearing up for a data-driven initiative that spans the full spectrum—from raw ingestion through insight delivery—and I want a senior-level data scientist to steer the technical work. The scope is intentionally broad right now because I’m still gathering business requirements, but the essentials are clear:

• You’ll clean, explore, and engineer features from whatever data sources we finalise (they may include structured tables, free-text logs, images, or time-series feeds). 
• When the data story warrants it, you’ll build and validate predictive or prescriptive models in Python or R, leveraging libraries such as pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Prophet, or similar. 
• Clear, decision-ready output matters, so expect to create concise visualisations or dashboards—Tableau, Power BI, or matplotlib/Plotly—alongside well-annotated notebooks and a short slide deck summarising key findings. 
• Every step should be reproducible. Please version your code in Git and containerise any complex environments with Docker so I can run everything on my end without guesswork.

Deliverables I’ll review for acceptance 
1. A Git repository containing notebooks/scripts, modular functions, and a README that explains setup and usage. 
2. A standalone model artefact (if modelling is required) with instructions for retraining and inference. 
3. A share-link or packaged dashboard plus a brief report (5–10 slides) highlighting insights, limitations, and next steps.

I’m happy to iterate on requirements as we refine the problem statement together, but I need someone who is comfortable making the first technical moves with limited upfront direction and who communicates clearly about assumptions, risks, and trade-offs. If that sounds like you, let’s get started.

projects.title: Part-Time Travel Blog Writer
projects.full_description:
A Memorable Journey to Manali: Exploring the Heart of the Himalayas

Travel has a unique way of enriching our lives. It allows us to step away from our daily routines, discover new places, meet different people, and create memories that last a lifetime. Among the many beautiful destinations in India, Manali stands out as one of the most enchanting hill stations. Nestled in the majestic Himalayas of Himachal Pradesh, Manali offers breathtaking landscapes, pleasant weather, adventure activities, and a peaceful atmosphere that attracts travelers from all over the world.

My journey to Manali began on a cool summer morning. After months of planning and excitement, I finally boarded a bus from Delhi to Manali. The overnight journey was long but enjoyable. As the bus moved through winding mountain roads, the scenery gradually transformed from bustling cities to lush green valleys and towering mountains. The fresh mountain air and stunning views immediately made me feel relaxed and refreshed.

Upon arriving in Manali, I was greeted by the sight of snow-capped peaks and the soothing sound of the Beas River flowing nearby. The town was surrounded by dense pine forests and colorful houses that blended beautifully with the natural landscape. After checking into a cozy hotel, I took some time to rest before beginning my exploration of this charming destination.

One of the first places I visited was the famous Hadimba Devi Temple. Surrounded by cedar forests, this ancient temple is dedicated to Goddess Hadimba, a character from the Indian epic Mahabharata. Built in the sixteenth century, the temple is known for its unique wooden architecture and peaceful environment. Walking through the forest paths leading to the temple felt like stepping into a different world. The calm atmosphere and historical significance of the site made it a memorable experience.

The next destination on my itinerary was Mall Road, the bustling heart of Manali. This vibrant street is lined with shops, cafes, restaurants, and local markets. Visitors can buy traditional handicrafts, woolen clothes, souvenirs, and handmade jewelry. I spent several hours exploring the market and interacting with local shopkeepers. The warm hospitality of the people added a special charm to the experience. I also enjoyed delicious local dishes, including Himachali cuisine that introduced me to new flavors and culinary traditions.

No trip to Manali is complete without visiting Solang Valley. Located a short distance from the town, Solang Valley is famous for its adventure activities and spectacular views. The valley offers opportunities for paragliding, zip-lining, skiing, and snowboarding depending on the season. As an adventure enthusiast, I decided to try paragliding for the first time.

Standing at the edge of the takeoff point, I felt both nervous and excited. Within moments, I was soaring high above the valley, enjoying a bird’s-eye view of the mountains, forests, and rivers below. The experience was exhilarating and unforgettable. Floating through the sky while surrounded by the beauty of nature gave me a sense of freedom unlike anything I had ever experienced before.

Another highlight of my trip was visiting the Rohtang Pass. Located at an altitude of over 13,000 feet, this mountain pass offers some of the most spectacular scenery in the region. The journey to Rohtang Pass itself was an adventure, with winding roads and breathtaking viewpoints along the way. Upon reaching the pass, I was amazed by the vast stretches of snow and the panoramic views of the surrounding peaks.

The cold mountain air and dazzling white landscape created a magical atmosphere. Visitors were enjoying snow activities, taking photographs, and simply admiring the beauty of the Himalayas. Spending time at Rohtang Pass was one of the most memorable moments of my entire journey.

Beyond the popular tourist attractions, Manali also offers opportunities for peaceful nature walks and exploration. One morning, I decided to visit Old Manali, a quieter part of the town known for its rustic charm and relaxed atmosphere. The narrow lanes, traditional houses, and scenic surroundings created a unique experience. Small cafes offered stunning mountain views and a chance to enjoy freshly brewed coffee while watching the world go by.

Old Manali is also a great place to connect with fellow travelers from different countries. During my visit, I met people who shared fascinating travel stories and recommendations. These conversations reminded me that travel is not only about places but also about the connections we make along the way.

The natural beauty of Manali extends far beyond its famous landmarks. Throughout my stay, I found joy in simple moments such as listening to the sound of the Beas River, watching the sunrise over the mountains, and breathing in the crisp mountain air. These experiences helped me appreciate the beauty and tranquility of nature.

One evening, I visited a riverside spot where I sat quietly and reflected on my journey. The river flowed steadily, carrying melted snow from distant glaciers. The setting sun painted the mountains in shades of orange and pink, creating a scene that seemed almost unreal. It was a perfect reminder of how travel allows us to reconnect with ourselves and the world around us.

Manali is also known for its rich culture and traditions. During my trip, I had the opportunity to witness local festivals and interact with residents who proudly shared stories about their heritage. Their deep connection to the mountains and respect for nature left a lasting impression on me. Learning about local customs added another layer of meaning to my travel experience.

As my journey came to an end, I realized that Manali had given me much more than beautiful photographs and exciting adventures. It had provided moments of peace, opportunities for personal growth, and memories that would stay with me forever. The combination of natural beauty, cultural richness, and warm hospitality makes Manali a truly special destination.

For anyone seeking a getaway from the fast pace of city life, Manali offers the perfect escape. Whether you are an adventure seeker, a nature lover, a photographer, or simply someone looking for relaxation, this Himalayan paradise has something to offer. From the serene forests and ancient temples to the thrilling activities and majestic mountains, every corner of Manali tells a story waiting to be discovered.

Traveling to Manali reminded me that the best journeys are not measured by distance but by the experiences and memories they create. As I boarded the bus back home, I carried with me a renewed appreciation for nature, a collection of unforgettable moments, and a promise to return one day to this beautiful corner of the Himalayas.

If you are planning your next travel adventure, consider adding Manali to your list. Its breathtaking landscapes, welcoming people, and unforgettable experiences make it a destination that truly captures the heart of every traveler.

projects.title: تعديل وتركيب تطبيق شات صوتي كامل (Rayzi) على أندرويد وآيفون
projects.full_description: السلام عليكم،أبحث عن مبرمج محترف وموثوق للعمل على تخصيص وتعديل تطبيق شات صوتي وغرف دردشة (شبيه بتطبيقات يلا لايف ومرحبًا وسوغو).سأقوم بشراء الكود المصدري الكامل لتطبيق Rayzi من موقع CodeCanyon، والمطلوب من المستقل القيام بالمهام التالية:تركيب لوحة تحكم المدير (Admin Panel) وإعدادها بالكامل على الاستضافة والسيرفر الخاص بي.ربط التطبيق بالخدمات الأساسية: سيرفر الصوت (Agora) وقاعدة البيانات وحسابات المستخدمين (Firebase).تخصيص التطبيق بالكامل: تغيير الاسم، تغيير الشعار (اللوجو)، تعديل الألوان، والأيقونات حسب هويتي الخاصة.استخراج النسخ النهائية وتجربتها، ثم رفعها بنجاح على حسابات المطورين الخاصة بي في متجر جوجل بلاي وآبل ستور وتجاوز المراجعة.شروط هامة:يرجى ممن لديه تجربة سابقة في تركيب تطبيق Rayzi أو تطبيقات مشابهة إرفاق روابط أعماله.الالتزام بتقديم الدعم الفني لفترة قصيرة بعد الإطلاق للتأكد من استقرار النظام.شكراً لكم وبانتظار عروضكم لبدء العمل فوراً.
